issues.description: Missing condition that makes the second action conditional on the first. The effect text states 'You may return 1 of your Characters...Play up to 1 Character...' implying the play action is conditional on returning a character. DSL requires either: (1) a condition linking the actions, or (2) separate effects with proper conditional structure.
Action 'PlayFromHand' should have a condition restricting it to execute only if a character was returned. Current structure lists both actions sequentially without dependency logic.

condition.description: Only if a character was returned to hand
